    sysutils/runj: update to v0.1.0, first tagged release

    - now we have tags, switch to go:modules fully
    - use REV_OVERRIDE per upstream recommendation to set
        runj --version output

    PR:             275652
    Reported by:    vd
    Sponsored by:   SkunkWerks, GmbH
